requests.prompt: App Store screenshot for a wellness alarm app. iPhone 6.5 inch (1290x2796) vertical. Background cream (#FAF7F2) with a faint warm orange gradient at the bottom. Center: stylized phone screen mockup showing a tiny sunset/sunrise icon. Above the phone, large bold sans-serif headline: 'Built for intention.' Below the phone, smaller text: 'By an independent developer.' Bottom corner: 'Morning Ritual' wordmark. Aesthetic: clean, calm, premium, with a personal human-told-story feel. The story element is the hero — a single person, a single place, a single intention. Honest, indie, warm.
